note: This baseline is the contract the coverage gate in .github/workflows/coverage.yml enforces on every PR. Update it in the same PR as any deliberate regression (e.g. dead code removal that shrinks a surface). See .coverage-gate.toml for thresholds and docs/COVERAGE.md#for-ai-coding-agents for the remediation loop.
